stopAgentFailed: Не вдалося зупинити цього асистента. Спробуйте ще раз.

create.title: New Team
create.supportedAgentsHint: Наразі підтримуються асистенти Claude та Aion CLI. Інші асистенти з'являться незабаром.
create.leaderDesc: Розуміє ваші цілі та координує асистентів для виконання завдань
create.selectAtLeastOneMember: Select at least one assistant as the Team Leader.
create.subtitle: Let multiple AI assistants team up and collaborate. We suggest one team focuses on a single goal — create separate teams for different tasks.
create.membersHelper: Choose team members and assign one Leader. The same assistant can be selected multiple times.
create.memberHint: No suitable assistant as a member? After creation, let the Leader create temporary team members in chat.

removeAgent.confirmContent: Remove this member from the team?
removeAgent.confirmContentActive: This member is working. Remove it anyway? Its current work will be interrupted.

emptyState.subtitle: Опишіть вашу ціль, і я залучу команду до її виконання

suggestions.debate: Організувати дебати між асистентами з різними точками зору
suggestions.expert_review: Залучити кількох експертів до аналізу однієї проблеми
suggestions.add_member: Help me add a member good at ___ to the team

emptyState.leaderGreeting: Hi, I'm the Leader. I understand your goal and coordinate the team — describe what you want and I'll arrange it.
emptyState.memberGreeting: Hi, I'm a team member. I take direction from the Leader and you.

addMember.title: Add member
addMember.subtitle: The same assistant can be added repeatedly
addMember.tellLeaderHint: Not a good fit? You can also ask the Leader to arrange it.
addMember.tellLeaderPrefill: Help me add a member good at ___ to the team

warmup.title: Waking up the team…
warmup.subtitle: Підготовка учасників
warmup.memberFailedHint: Switch its model above, or remove it from the bar on top, then retry.
warmup.leaderFailedHint: Switch its model above, then retry.
